lines.speaker: Northgate Innkeeper
lines.text: Beds are kept upstairs and the common room stays warm for travellers.

lines.speaker: Northgate Reeve
lines.text: The hall board carries work that needs doing. Names and details remain provisional.

lines.speaker: Northgate Resident
lines.text: Roads are busy today. The hall board carries local work.

lines.speaker: Northgate Shopkeeper
lines.text: General road goods, weighed and honestly priced.

lines.speaker: Northgate Smith
lines.text: I keep road gear sound and sell what the forge can spare.
